HE SAID YES. okay okay okay let me slow down and actually write this. we were on the miradouro in Lisbon, the one Tommy pretended he found by accident even though i KNOW he scouted it because there were fairy lights and our song was playing from a tiny speaker hidden in his backpack. the whole city was orange below us, laundry lines and rooftops and the river doing that molten thing it does at seven pm. and he got down on one knee and his hands were shaking so badly he dropped the box and we both dove for it and cracked heads and started laughing so hard he had to propose sitting down. "will you do the enormous thing with me", that's what he said, the enormous thing, because that's what we've called the future since our second date. i said yes before he finished the sentence. i called my sister and she screamed. i keep looking at my hand like it belongs to someone else, someone luckier. i want to remember every single detail forever, the fairy lights, the cracked heads, the orange city. i am so full of it i could float.
